rationale: Elec. Code §273.002 governs attorney general election investigations and local assistance. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 273.002. LOCAL ASSISTANCE TO ATTORNEY GENERAL. For an election in which the attorney general is conducting an investigation, the attorney general may:
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this election investigation provision.
